name: mango-plugins
description: Marketplace hosting the mango plugin: a portable, gated ticket-lifecycle harness for Claude Code that ships machinery, never a project's domain rules.

plugins.name: mango
plugins.description: Gated ticket-lifecycle harness (analysis → design → execute → review → finalise). Project rules are read at runtime from .harness.json; trust comes from emitted, counted, gate-blocking artifacts.
